headline: Missed the Buy Point On Amphenol Stock? Here's Another Spot To Get In.
summary: This electronics stock hit a buy point and an all-time high on Monday. The fiber-optics leader is also a data center electronics product provider.

headline: Amphenol Corp. (NYSE:APH) Shines in Navellier Growth Screen With Strong Earnings, Cash Flow, and Margin Expansion
summary: Amphenol Corp. (APH) passes eight key growth criteria from the "Little Book That Makes You Rich" strategy, with 54% revenue growth, 77% EPS growth, strong cash flow, and expanding margins.

headline: Nvidia Isn't The Only Potential Winner From SpaceX's $85 Billion IPO
summary: SpaceX's $85 billion IPO could benefit far more than Nvidia. Here's a look at the suppliers tied to Starlink, xAI, AI infrastructure, aerospace materials, data center...
